repair.diff:
--- a/calculator.py
+++ b/calculator.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
     """Return the sum of two integers."""
-    return a - b
+    return a + b

reasons: single product-source file in the verified adapter
tests and project metadata remain immutable
stale-input check required immediately before source application
backup and post-apply rollback are mandatory

message: A verified repair is ready in isolation; source-application consent was absent.
